scores.notes: The OCR output has some character-level errors (e.g., 'MR D. T. Y. SM1 SUN 000' instead of 'MR D.I.Y. (M) SDN BHD'), but the numeric values and date are mostly accurate. The table structure is preserved, though there are additional details not in the ground truth. The layout is mostly correct, and all key information from the ground truth is captured.
